subcodes.first_line: The mention of the Chosen One hath been raised from the Lote-Tree of Fire at the Dawning-Place of Lights - verily, there is no God but Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع ذکر المختار من سدره النار عند مطلع الانوار انه لا اله الا انا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power of prayer, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
